subject: Re: XML Conversion between Warp and Relion Tomo
body:
Hi Viraj,

I did it before.
https://github.com/builab/subtomo/blob/main/warptsxml2ctffind.py

My script doesn't need much dependency, just python 3.

best,
Huy

On Wed, Nov 29, 2023 at 3:23 PM Viraj Upadhye <vu32@cornell.edu> wrote:

> Hi all,
>
> I am running through a STA pipeline and would like to try to import tomos
> into relion. I want to extract a ctffind4 like output txt from warp xml
> files using the warpxml2ctffind from Dendooventom and alisterburt.
> https://github.com/Dendooventom/warp2relion-tomo
>
> We have installed and reinstalled warp2relion-tomo with
> pip install git+https://github.com/Dendooventom/warp2relion-tomo.git
> All the dependencies look right but it cant seem to find
> generate_ctffind_output.py as suspected by the following error:
>
>   File "/home/user/miniconda3/bin/warpxml2ctffind", line 5, in <module>
>     from generate_ctffind_output import cli
> ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'generate_ctffind_output'
>
> Has anyone experienced this? Is there another work around to achieve the
> same goal?
>
> Thank you for your help!
>
> Best,
> Viraj
>
> --

> .
>
